channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: DMW and Global Anti-Scam Alliance Sign MOU to Enhance Protection for Overseas Filipino Workers Against Online Scams
item.description: The Department of Migrant Workers (DMW) has entered into a formal partnership with the Global Anti-Scam Alliance (GASA) through a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) to combat the rising threat of sophi...

item.title: How Investors Can Manage Portfolios Amid Ongoing Middle East Conflict
item.description: The recent outbreak of conflict in the Middle East has unsettled global markets, though initial reactions were muted. The TSX saw a slight rise, while U.S. markets experienced minor declines. Escalati...

item.title: US Justice Department Releases Previously Withheld FBI Interviews Alleging Trump Sexual Assault of Minor in Epstein Case
item.description: The U.S. Department of Justice recently published additional documents from its files on convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein, including FBI interview summaries (known as 302 reports) that had been ...

item.title: Major fire in building near Glasgow Central Station causes full closure and widespread disruption
item.description: A significant fire broke out in a four-storey building on Union Street in Glasgow city centre on Sunday, 8 March 2026, starting around 3:46 pm. The blaze, believed to have originated in a vape shop on...

item.title: Congress Seeks Detailed Parliamentary Debate on West Asia Situation
item.description: New Delhi: Ahead of the second part of the Budget session starting Monday, Congress has urged for a detailed parliamentary debate on the ongoing crisis in West Asia. External Affairs Minister S. Jaish...

item.title: Celebrating the Women Who Shaped Nollywood From Early Theatre to Global Streaming
item.description: For real, if you wan understand how Nollywood take grow from small beginnings reach global stage, you gats look at the women wey dey behind the scenes and on screen. From the experimental theatre of t...

item.title: Trump Supporters Endorse Airstrikes but Oppose Ground Troops in Iran
item.description: A week into the conflict between the US and Iran, President Donald Trump's bombing campaign has stirred mixed reactions among his voters. Interviews with eight Trump supporters, part of a larger ongoi...

item.title: LTO suspends driver’s license for 90 days after Manila road rage collision
item.description: The Land Transportation Office (LTO) has temporarily suspended the driver’s license of a motorist involved in a road rage incident in Manila. The suspension will last for 90 days, while the vehicle in...

item.title: White House Keeps Options Open on Possible Ground Deployment in Iran
item.description: During a recent Fox News appearance, White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt addressed questions about the potential deployment of U.S. ground troops in Iran. Leavitt emphasized that while no imm...

item.title: Continuity of care with midwives or doctors reduces birth trauma in Australian women
item.description: A recent study of 3,682 Australian women who gave birth during 2020–2021 has found that continuity of care—seeing the same midwife or a small team of midwives throughout pregnancy, labour and postnata...

item.title: FA Cup Prize Money: Chelsea and Arsenal Earnings After Reaching Quarterfinals
item.description: Chelsea and Arsenal have successfully made it to the 2025/2026 FA Cup quarterfinals, joining other big teams like Liverpool and Manchester City. Arsenal managed a tough 2-1 win over Mansfield, keeping...

item.title: In-Depth Review: How the Capital One Venture X Rewards Card Offsets Its Annual Fee for Frequent Travelers
item.description: The Capital One Venture X Rewards Credit Card is CNN Underscored’s top pick among premium travel rewards cards. Designed for frequent travelers, it offers strong earning potential, valuable credits, a...

item.title: Seventh US service member dies from injuries sustained in Iranian attack on troops in Saudi Arabia
item.description: The US military has reported that a seventh service member has been killed in action during Operation Epic Fury, the ongoing conflict with Iran. The individual died on Saturday night from injuries rec...

item.title: Simba and Yanga Share Points in Historic Zanzibar Derby

item.title: How Tinkering, Teamwork, Trade, and Infrastructure Drive Innovation

item.title: Parliament set to debate motion for removal of Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla

item.title: UK Surgeon Performs Long-Distance Robotic Prostate Surgery
item.description: In a groundbreaking medical development, a surgeon in London successfully performed the UK's first long-distance robotic surgery on a patient located 1,500 miles away in Gibraltar. Professor Prokar Da...

item.title: Calgary Startup Advances Exploration of Natural Hydrogen Resources in Canada
